title: Discord node operation error during execution
symptom: The Discord node fails to execute and throws a 'NodeOperationError' message. This occurs when trying to send a message using the node.
applies_when: Executing a workflow that sends a message
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or integration
root_cause: The error indicates that there is a misconfiguration in the Discord node settings, particularly related to the webhook URL or permissions. This can happen if the webhook used in the current workflow is different from what is expected based on the course materials.
fix_steps: Verify the webhook URL used in the Discord node settings
Ensure it matches the one provided in the relevant course
Check the permissions of the webhook to ensure it can send messages
agent_instruction: Double-check the Discord webhook configuration in your workflow.
